name: Pinapple Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut each squash in half and scoop out the seeds and pulp. Discard them.
3. Trim the tip off the bottom of each squash cup, if necessary, so that they stand up straight.
4. Fill each squash cup with 1/4 cup pineapple mixture (pineapple juice mixed with a sprinkle of margarine and cinnamon).
5. Place the squash in a flat baking dish and pour hot water around the bottoms of the squash cups to a depth of about 1/2 inch.
6. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until the squash is tender and can be easily pierced with a fork.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE; Low-sodium diets: This recipe is excellent. CAL: 148; CHO: 34g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 2g; SOD: 31mg; CHO: 0g.
